case_title: 126 POST STREET BUILDING, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP et al vs. AMERICAN EAGLE TRAVEL NETWORK et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 126 POST STREET BUILDING, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP WU, VICTOR, GENERAL PARTNER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN EAGLE TRAVEL NETWORK SANTOS, NENITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 126 POST ST #406 $5,350.00 RENT, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $139.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,239.00, LEASE FORFEITED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 126 POST STREET BUILDING, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP WU, VICTOR, GENERAL PARTNER AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN EAGLE TRAVEL NETWORK SANTOS, NENITA DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WINER, SAMUEL A SUBSTITUTED FOR SCHULTZ, TODD L AS ATTORNEY FOR 126 POST STREET BUILDING, A CALIF LTD PARTNERSHIP
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTFS.
